name: BubbleChart
searchText: bubblechart bubble chart component @mantine/charts /charts/bubble-chart color data datakey gridcolor label range scatterprops textcolor tooltipprops valueformatter withtooltip xaxisprops yaxisprops zaxisprops

props.name: color
props.description: Color of the chart items. Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color.

props.name: dataKey
props.description: Data keys for x, y and z axis

props.name: gridColor
props.description: Color of the grid and cursor lines, by default depends on color scheme

props.name: label
props.description: Chart label displayed next to the x axis

props.name: scatterProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Scatter component

props.name: textColor
props.description: Color of the text displayed inside the chart

props.name: tooltipProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Tooltip component

props.name: valueFormatter
props.description: Function to format z axis values

props.name: withTooltip
props.description: Determines whether the tooltip should be displayed

props.name: xAxisProps
props.description: Props passed down to the XAxis recharts component

props.name: yAxisProps
props.description: Props passed down to the YAxis recharts component

props.name: zAxisProps
props.description: Props passed down to the ZAxis recharts component
